creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* mnag@FreeBSD.org (mnag@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> Build is fine on my tinderbox. Maybe is a temporary error.
Not sure. While it installs correctly on another system, here it
installs an egg instead of ZSI/ directory:
